text_block_list.text: What, so just 'cause I'm small, I don't even get a chance?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An outburst of anger cuts through the cafeteria's idle lunchtime
chatter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The room is stunned silent... until a whisper of voices begins to buzz,
and students nervously turn their eyes to the offending table.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The student who shouted stands up, hardly taller than when she was
seated.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! Waaait, wait, wait! I didn't mean it like that, Taishin! I
swear it's not about your height!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ticket does make a valid point, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sufficient nutrition is certainly essential to physical growth, but what
you have there is far more food than you require.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Heaps of food lie on the table next to Narita Taishin. There's no way
she'll finish it all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Who asked you...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Just listen, will you? I don't want a repeat of how you ate yourself sick
the other day. You're a naturally light eater—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I said, SHUT IT!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: T-Taishin! Come on, can't we just—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Get away from me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And quit nagging me. Just leave me alone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The scene leaves a bad aftertaste that lingers in the back of my mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way home from a long day's work, I hear footsteps from the
darkened training course.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...
choice_data_list: (Someone's doing laps? At this time of night?)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Furiously running around the course is the petit racer from lunch
today, Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Grrr... Raaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through gritted teeth, she lets out an agonized shout that echoes
throughout the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The frustration—the desperation—in her steps... It almost hurts to watch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days later... runners line the track for tryouts, eager to show
trainers their hard-won skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For many of the determined athletes, it represents the chance of a
lifetime and the first step toward the big leagues.

text_block_list.name: Racer
text_block_list.text: Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Racer
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I didn't see you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin, barely visible, struggles to stand out among the many
debut hopefuls.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, look at that tiny one over there. Hm... To be honest, I'm not
seeing anyone promising.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. Usually we get at least one from a good family, or even just
someone with a nice, athletic build.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hey now. We won't really know anything until we see them run. Look,
they're about to start!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph... I'm gonna do this. They'll finally see!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here we go! The racers are lined up at the starting gate... And they're
off!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Haaah!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? That tiny kid's trying to get out of the pack! She's not gonna try
and push her way through to the front, is she?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Mhm. But with that small frame of hers...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I knew it. The middle's too much for her. She's at a total disadvantage
stature-wise.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Damn it!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Geez, the others are just brushing her off... There's no way she has
enough stamina to keep up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The leaders have rounded the fourth corner! But what's this? A
challenger is fast approaching!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Aaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Narita Taishin! Narita Taishin rushes ahead with tremendous
speed! She's going for the lead!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She wasted all her energy at the start. What reckless running... It hurts
to watch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt her break for the front was a sight to behold. But in
the end, Narita Taishin slipped down in position... and finished in
tenth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After the intense race...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... That sucked... My head is pounding.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Taishin, do you have a moment to—oh dear, are you okay? Still
can't catch your breath?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm?! No, I'm fine. You need something?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
No... That race told me everything. I hate to say this, but... You just
aren't built for racing. You should do yourself a favor and give up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
You're too small. If you pulled a stunt like that in the Twinkle Series,
you could get yourself seriously hurt.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
For your safety... Start looking into other career paths. There are
plenty of choices for Umamusume besides racing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Buzz off.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Listen to me, Taishin! Please, I'm saying this for your sake. Would you
at least—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Just shut up already! You're saying it for my sake? Hah! What a load of crap!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll show you all! I'm going to win if it's the last thing I do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin spits the words out and runs off in a huff. The crushed
look in her eyes as she passes me—it's heartbreaking.
